metadata.description: Official DryRunSecurity skills for AI coding assistants. Fix security vulnerabilities identified in your pull requests.

plugins.name: dryrun-remediation
plugins.description: Fix security vulnerabilities identified by DryRunSecurity PR scans

plugins.name: dryrun-pr-review
plugins.description: PR workflow automation for DryRunSecurity users - creates commits, branches, and PRs following conventions, then polls for and addresses DryRunSecurity review comments.
